mapper.sql: storeId, storeName, storeAddrId, storeImgUrl, storeLinkUrl,currentNum, storeArea, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into store (storeId, storeName, storeAddrId, storeImgUrl,storeLinkUrl currentNum, storeArea, createdDate) values (#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{storeLinkUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{storeArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into store
storeId,
storeName,
storeAddrId,
storeImgUrl,
storeLinkUrl,
currentNum,
storeArea,
createdDate,
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storeLinkUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{currentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{storeArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update store
storeName = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
storeAddrId = #{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
storeImgUrl = #{storeImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
storeLinkUrl = #{storeLinkUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
currentNum = #{currentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
storeArea = #{storeArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store set storeName = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, storeAddrId = #{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, storeImgUrl = #{storeImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, storeLinkUrl = #{storeLinkUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, currentNum = #{currentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, storeArea = #{storeArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT s.storeId, s.storeName, s.storeAddrId, s.storeImgUrl, (select count(*) from store_device sd inner join face_identy_record fir on sd.deviceNo=fir.deviceNo where sd.storeId=#{storeId}) as currentNum, s.storeArea, concat(a.province,' ',a.city,' ',a.zone,' ',a.storeAddrDetail) as addressDetail, concat(a.province,' ',a.city,' ',a.zone,' ',a.storeAddrDetail) as storeAddrDetail FROM store s LEFT JOIN store_address a ON a.storeAddrId = s.storeAddrId WHERE s.storeId = #{storeId} and s.status=1
select storeName from store where storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
